tagline: A safe space to speak up and seek help.
pupilForMe: A safe way to tell someone if something is wrong, even anonymously
pupilForFriends: Report things happening to someone else without anyone knowing it was you
pupilForSchool: Helps adults see problems early so they can keep everyone safe
staffForMe: Log incidents in 60 seconds with guided protocol steps for serious cases
staffForPupils: Spot patterns across classes that no single teacher could see alone
staffForParents: Parents get notified privately when the school acts on something involving their child
parentForMe: Get private notifications when the school identifies or acts on something involving your child
parentForChild: Know your child has a safe, anonymous way to speak up if something is wrong
parentForSchool: See real data on how safe children feel, not just promises
ptaForMe: Anonymised safeguarding data you can share at governor meetings with confidence
ptaForParents: Give families evidence that their concerns are heard and acted on
ptaForSchool: Hold leadership accountable with outcome data, not just policies
enterAccessCodePrompt: Enter the class access code your teacher gave you
selectNameAndPassword: Please select your name and enter your password.
showMeAroundParent: Show me around as a parent
seeHowItWorksDesc: Follow Sofia's story — see how pupils, parents, teachers, and coordinators work together
protectedBy: Protected by safeskoolz. Your reports are confidential.
